user.title: Add Orphek Light
user.description: Choose how to set up your Orphek lights.

orphek_login.title: Orphek Account Login
orphek_login.description: Enter your Orphek app credentials to automatically discover and set up your lights.

discover.title: Select Devices
discover.description: The following Orphek lights were found. Select which ones to add.

manual.title: Manual Device Setup
manual.description: Enter the connection details for your Orphek light.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Orphek Account
reauth_confirm.description: Your Orphek cloud session has expired and automatic re-login failed. Please re-enter your credentials.

abort.no_devices_found: No Orphek lights found. Make sure they are powered on and connected to the same network.
abort.no_keys_found: Orphek lights were found on your network but their local keys could not be retrieved. Please use manual setup, or pair the devices with the SmartLife app first and try again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check IP, Device ID, and Local Key.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your Orphek app credentials.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.
